extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI Sonny won bunch sprint after peloton neutralized all late attacks including GASPAROTTO at 38km and ROBERTS at 28km
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO Alexey animated across multiple bonus sprints reveals Astana prioritizing time bonuses over stage hunting in shorter stage races.
CCC and Quickstep led out despite no team sprinter winning, suggesting leadout dominance doesn't correlate with stage success here.
Late solo attacks GASPAROTTO 38km and ROBERTS 28km both peaked at ~57-59 seconds, revealing precise peloton control threshold.

rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: finally won after being 'nearly man' suggests cumulative fatigue affects competitors more than him late tour
rider_signals.LAMPAART Yves: positive: second place and third GC at 13 seconds shows unexpected stage race legs for sprinter type
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: neutral: aggressive bonus hunting didn't translate to GC podium, revealing time bonuses insufficient without base form
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: finished third despite ideal setup suggests declining sprint power or poor positioning in short tours
